title: Gooey Australian Parmigiano-Reggiano Stir-fry
description: This halal-friendly, gooey post-workout dish is a fermented delicacy featuring Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese that’s slow-cooked to perfection.

ingredients.name: 1 cup halal-friendly stir-fry vegetables (e.g., carrots, bell peppers)

instructions: Preheat your wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the stir-fry vegetables to the pan, tossing in a tablespoon of sesame oil for about 5 minutes until they are slightly softened.
Drain any excess water from the vegetable mixture and add it back into the pan.
Pour in the soy sauce and water, stirring continuously to prevent sticking. Reduce heat to low-medium once combined.
Add grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and salt and pepper to taste. Stir-fry for an additional 3 minutes until the cheese is melted and cheese sauce forms around the vegetables.
Serve hot as a side dish or appetizer, garnished with extra sesame seeds if desired.
